omission_flags: The analysis explicitly states in the confidence section that Mubarak's motivation is unknown and refrains from speculation. However, to avoid a potential omission bias regarding his agency, the body text itself should briefly clarify whether Mubarak offered any public rationale in his 19 April declaration.

cardinal_sin_flags.quote: The same Undang crowned him in 2008.
cardinal_sin_flags.why: 'Crowned' is culturally inaccurate for Negeri Sembilan's Adat Perpatih. The YDPB is 'proclaimed' (dimasyhurkan), not crowned, as no crown is utilized in the custom.

verification_log.claim: former Undang Luak Sungai Ujong, Datuk Mubarak Dohak, signed and read a declaration on 19 April 2026 purporting to depose Tuanku Muhriz
state government, Telaga Undang customary council, constitution all reject the declaration
Mubarak Dohak himself removed from office 11 months ago
Articles 10-12 govern the Ruler; no unilateral-deposal provision
17 April 2026 DKU sitting presided by Tuanku Muhriz

overall_assessment: Highly factual, objectively neutral, solidly grounded in breaking news without speculation. Synthesis of dates, constitutional citations, and historical precedents is accurate and rigorously verified. The only flaw is the culturally inaccurate 'crowned' which anglicises the Malay customary practice of proclamation.
